title: Gradual deployments
excerpt: description: Incrementally deploy code changes to your Workers with gradual deployments. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Gradual Deployments give you the ability to incrementally deploy new [versions](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/configuration/versions-and-deployments/#versions) of Workers by splitting traffic across versions. ![Gradual Deployments](https://developers.cloudflare.com/_astro/gradual-deployments.C6F9MQ6U_ZVKcdL.webp)
